description: Style Note Stylish and subtle, this shirt from the arrow collection is made with fine attention to detail that will quickly elevate it to a wardrobe favourite. The full sleeves add a refined touch to your formal ensemble and will also keep the winter chill at bay, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with simple chinos for a knockout weekend style. Product Details White striped shirt, has full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar with buttoned front placket and a curved hem Material and Care 100% cotton Gentle machine wash with cold water using a non-chlorine detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry inside out in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18:) is wearing a size M Style NoteStylish and subtle, this shirt from the Arrow collection is made with fine attention to detail that will quickly elevate it to a wardrobe favourite.
